title: Charaka Saṃhitā
author: Agniveśa, redacted by Charaka
translation: Public-domain English translations exist (e.g. A.C. Kaviratna & P. Sharma, 1890s; later editions)
note: Foundational text of Ayurvedic internal medicine (kāyacikitsā). Locators given at section (sthāna) level; exact verse numbers should be confirmed against a specific edition during expansion.

title: Suśruta Saṃhitā
author: Suśruta
translation: K.K. Bhishagratna English translation (1907-1916), public domain
note: Foundational text emphasising surgery (śalya) and materia medica.

title: Aṣṭāṅga Hṛdaya
author: Vāgbhaṭa
note: Concise synthesis of Charaka and Suśruta; widely used reference.

title: Bhāvaprakāśa Nighaṇṭu
author: Bhāvamiśra
translation: Standard materia medica (nighaṇṭu) of single drugs
note: Classical reference for the properties (dravyaguṇa) of individual herbs.

title: The Ayurvedic Pharmacopoeia of India (API)
author: Govt. of India, Ministry of AYUSH
note: Official Indian government standard for identity, properties and dosage of Ayurvedic drugs. Used here as a properties/dosage reference; consult the official volumes for authoritative detail.

title: Modern peer-reviewed research (reference to be attached)
note: PLACEHOLDER. Where an indication is tiered 'preliminary' or 'clinical', the specific study (journal, year, DOI) must be attached here. Until then the citation carries requires_verification = true so the engine never overstates the evidence.
